mnemonics.title: IWBAO - Neuron Pipeline
mnemonics.content: Inputs -> Weights (multiply) -> Bias (add) -> Activation function -> Output. The five-step computation of every artificial neuron.

mnemonics.title: Activation Zoo
mnemonics.content: Step: 0 or 1 (binary). Sigmoid: 0 to 1 (probability). Tanh: -1 to 1 (centered). ReLU: 0 or input (simple, fast).

mnemonics.title: Bio = Arti Analogy
mnemonics.content: Dendrites=Inputs, Synapses=Weights, Soma=Summation, Threshold=Activation, Axon=Output. Biology inspired the math.

mnemonics.title: ReLU Wins
mnemonics.content: ReLU is preferred in hidden layers: fast computation, no vanishing gradient for positive values, sparse activation.

mnemonics.title: Bias = Flexibility
mnemonics.content: Without bias, the neuron's output always passes through origin. Bias adds the freedom to shift the function, like the intercept in y = mx + b.
